## 📋 Context
- **Market/Cinema:** (e.g., DRF Denmark / Big Bio Herlev)
- **Environment:** (e.g., Production eu-1 / Staging)

## 🔗 Resources

- **Tradedesk Link:**
- **Cloud Link:**
- **Teleport Resource Name:**
- **Cinema/Screen ID:**

## ❓ The Issue / Request
*Describe what you need help with or what isn't working as expected.*

## 🪵 Evidence (Logs / Screenshots)
> Please paste logs, Sentry links, or screenshots of the error here.

## 🚨 Urgency Check
- [ ] This is **NOT** a "Break-Glass" emergency (I expect a response within the 24-Hour Relay SLA).
- [ ] If this **IS** an emergency, I have used the **🚨 EMERGENCY: Break-Glass** template instead.
